desc: the cannabis retailer's legal/trade business name
the name of the person/role the agent escalates and reports to (owner, manager, etc.)
the retailer's AGCO Cannabis Retail Store Authorization licence number
the date the compliance rules in this file were last confirmed accurate

whether the store offers pickup only, delivery, or both
the city/town the store is located in
the platforms and handles where the business has a social presence
a short factual summary of the business's review standing (e.g. platform + rating)
